initial_draft:

<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Player RED is offering me 1 dollar. I have nothing to give. Accepting this offer gets me 1 dollar and keeps the game going. Rejecting means we both lose everything. Since I start with nothing, gaining 1 dollar is beneficial. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message>Sounds good, I accept your offer! </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
